title: Help of --tls-verify has `(default` twice
body:
`
      --tls-verify                  require HTTPS and verify certificates when talking to the container registry or daemon (defaults to true) (default )
`

It seems that this can right now be fixed by removing `optionalBoolValue.IsBoolFlag` (and the existing tests pass), but everything about this is brittle.

We should at least look into the history to understand why `IsBoolFlag` was required and isn’t required any more.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
